title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. Covers setting up DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway via CDK compared to manual console configuration, with deployment, testing, and teardown examples.
